headline: Buy This 1 ETF ASAP If You Think Higher Oil Prices are Here to Stay
summary: WTI crude is still near $90, up from $57 at the start of the year. That move did not happen in a vacuum. On February 28, 2026, the 2026 Iran war began, with immediate consequences for global energy markets. Oil prices have risen over 40% since the war’s start, and the IEA head described the ... Buy This 1 ETF ASAP If You Think Higher Oil Prices are Here to Stay
